case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TIFFANY SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED JUN-20-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY DOES 1 TO 5 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 70 CASHMERE ST., #1-B, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATING JUDGMENT

DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
